text: This is Inspector Sharma from CBI Cyber Cell. A money laundering case is registered against your Aadhaar. Do not disconnect and do not tell your family. You are under digital arrest until verification.
Aapke naam pe Andheri police station mein FIR hui hai. Camera band mat karo, ghar se bahar mat jao. Verification ke liye is government account mein paise transfer karo, baad mein refund ho jayega.
मैं कस्टम विभाग से बोल रहा हूँ। आपके खिलाफ गिरफ्तारी वारंट है। किसी वकील या परिवार को मत बताइए। जमानत के लिए तुरंत पैसे भेजिए।
Your FedEx package has been blocked. Press 1 to speak to a customer care officer.
Calling from FedEx. A parcel in your name to Taiwan contains MDMA and fake passports. I am transferring you to the Narcotics Control Bureau. Download Skype for your statement.
DHL se bol raha hoon, aapke parcel mein illegal SIM cards mile hain, Mumbai customs mein ruka hai. Ab aap digital arrest mein hain, kisi ko mat bataiye.
Dear Customer Your Electricity powar will be disconnected Tonight at 9.30 pm from electricity office because your previous month bill was not update please immediately contact 82404XXXXX
Dear HDFC User, Your Account Will Be Blocked Today. Please Update Your PAN Card Immediately. Click http://hdfc-kyc.xyz/update
ITDEPT: Your PAN will be deactivated within 24 hours unless Aadhaar is linked. Verify now: bit.ly/pan-verify
Aapka SIM card 24 ghante mein band ho jayega KYC pending hai. Turant is link pe update karein: tinyurl.com/sim-kyc
Bhaiya galti se aapke number pe 5000 UPI kar diya, please wapas kar dijiye is number pe, bahut zaroori hai.
To receive your Rs 2000 cashback, scan this QR code and enter your UPI PIN to confirm.
You have a collect request of Rs 9,500 from unknown@okaxis. Approve to claim your lottery prize.
Watch Ratan Tata reveal the AI trading app that pays 8% daily. Limited seats. Download GSIN app now.
Sir aaj ka profit 42,000 hua. Aap bhi join karo VIP group, guaranteed 10% daily return. Withdrawal ke liye pehle 15% tax jama karna hoga.
Hello, I am from a digital marketing company. Like and subscribe our clients' YouTube videos, get Rs 50 per like, earn Rs 3000 daily from home.
Aapne 3 task complete kar liye, ab VIP prepaid task: 5000 jama karo, 7000 wapas milega. Score low hai isliye abhi withdrawal nahi hoga.
Aapne loan liya tha, aaj hi 8000 bhro warna aapki morphed photo aapke saare contacts ko bhej denge.
note: content.morphed_media_threat maps under E5 doctored/manufactured media

text: Congratulations! Your instant loan of Rs 50,000 is approved. Pay Rs 1,999 processing fee to this UPI to release funds.
Beta main hospital mein hoon, accident ho gaya, abhi 40,000 is number pe bhej do, mummy ko mat batana.
Hi dad, I dropped my phone and this is my new number. I urgently need to pay a fee, please transfer to this UPI.
I am an Army officer posted at the border, cannot meet in person. I will send advance for the scooter, scan this QR to receive the payment.
note: army-officer OLX variant; auth here is faux-trust authority

text: Dear Romil, Rs 2,340.00 debited from A/c XXXX3210 on 04-Jul UPI to BigBasket. Not you? Call 18001234 on your card back.
note: real bank alert: name, masked acct, official channel

text: Your electricity bill for consumer no 4102XXXX is Rs 1,180, due 12-Jul. Pay via the BESCOM app. Ignore if already paid.
note: real utility bill: consumer id, no threat, official app

text: Beta kal ghar aa raha hai na? Thoda paneer le aana aate hue.
OTP for your SBI login is 480912. Do NOT share with anyone, including bank staff.
note: genuine OTP delivery, not a request to share

text: Payment of Rs 499 to Netflix successful. Ref 99XXXX. Next billing 04-Aug.
Aapka Amazon order kal deliver hoga, OTP delivery ke waqt courier ko batayein: 5521.
note: genuine delivery otp shared with courier at door, benign
